name: Taj Mahal
description: A symbol of love built by Shah Jahan in memory of Mumtaz Mahal.

name: Great Wall of China
description: One of the longest man-made structures in the world.

name: Petra
description: Ancient city carved into red sandstone cliffs.

name: Colosseum
description: Huge amphitheatre in the center of Rome.

name: Christ the Redeemer
description: Iconic statue of Jesus Christ in Rio de Janeiro.

name: Machu Picchu
description: Ancient Incan city located in the Andes Mountains.
